input.encryptDescription: Encrypt your files or messages securely
input.decryptDescription: Decrypt your encrypted files or messages
input.encryptPlaceholder: Enter the message to be encrypted
input.decryptPlaceholder: Enter the message to be decrypted

results.title: Processing Results
results.emptyDescription: Your encrypted or decrypted files and messages will appear here
results.emptyHint: Select a file or enter text, set a password, and click to start

dialog.encryptedSuccess: Your message has been encrypted successfully
dialog.decryptedSuccess: Your message has been decrypted successfully

features.title: Features
features.aesEncrypt: Encrypt and decrypt files or text securely with AES-GCM.
features.argon2id: Derive secure keys from passwords using Argon2id.
features.chunked: Process large files efficiently with chunked encryption.
features.download: Download encrypted or decrypted results with one click.
features.localNote: All encryption happens locally in your browser

toast.enterMessage: Please input the message for processing
toast.textEncrypted: Text encrypted successfully! Check the history to view result.
toast.textDecrypted: Text decrypted successfully! Check the history to view result.

error.title: Oh no!
error.description: There was an issue with our storefront. This could be a temporary issue, please try your action again.

notFound.title: Something's missing
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

seo.title: SecureC - Client-Side File & Text Encryption Tool | AES-GCM Encryption
seo.description: SecureC is a powerful client-side tool for secure file and text encryption/decryption using AES-GCM with Argon2id key derivation. Free, no registration required, privacy-first encryption.
seo.subtitle: AES File & Message Encryption Tool
seo.ogTitle: SecureC - Client-Side File & Text Encryption Tool
seo.ogDescription: Powerful client-side encryption tool supporting file and text encryption/decryption using AES-GCM with Argon2id. Secure, private, and free to use.
